def negative_django_queryset_len_instead_of_count():
    rule_id = "django_queryset_len_instead_of_count"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "len(queryset) is used where queryset.count() would avoid loading every row."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
